name: Rikka Invitation
desc:
If you control no monsters: Special Summon 1 "Rikka" monster from your Deck, then you can Tribute 1 monster on your field, and if you do, Special Summon 2 "Rikka" monsters from your Deck, also you cannot Special Summon monsters for the rest of this turn, except Plant monsters.
If a Plant monster you control would be destroyed, you can banish this card from your GY instead.
You can only activate 1 "Rikka Invitation" per turn.
strings: Banish from GY to prevent destruction
